briefdescription.para: working movement in an arc clockwise

detaileddescription.para: working movement in an arc counterclockwise
type of coordinates to be entered. movement - repeatable. other - after execution, it will return to movement

briefdescription.para: internal states (such as current position and different work modes)
work plane for calculation arc movement
last values of x, y, z (translation. positions of linear movement motors)
last values of a, b, c (rotation. angles of circular movement motors)
cached rotation matrices. to avoid calculating for each line (without rotation)

detaileddescription.para: input data (data entered in last line)

briefdescription.para: string list with sets of command (frames)
process all lines g-code source and generate corresponding move actions

detaileddescription.para: sample arc points in 2d by begin point, end point and center in (0, 0)

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector3f &center, const Vector3f &beginPoint, const Vector3f &endPoint, bool clockwise)
memberdef.name: getArcPoints3_

briefdescription.para: sample arc points in 3d by begin point, end point and center

memberdef.argsstring: (float r, const Vector3f &beginPoint, const Vector3f &endPoint, bool clockwise)
memberdef.name: getArcPoints3_

detaileddescription.para: sample arc points in 3d by begin point, end point and radius r > 0 : angle - [0, 180] r < 0 : angle - (0, 360)

briefdescription.para: sample arc points of tool movement during rotation
class to process g-code source and generate toolpath
